domain.description: The domain name to associate with the organization e.g. acme.com.

use_for_organization_discovery.description: Indicates whether this domain should be used for organization discovery.

verification_txt.description: A unique token generated for the discovery domain. This must be placed in a DNS TXT record at the location specified by the verification_host field to prove domain ownership.

verification_host.description: The full domain where the TXT record should be added.
